description: Perform a log-transformation on the 'count' variable in the InsectSprays dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/InsectSprays.csv) by creating a Computed Variable named 'ln_count' with the formula LN(count + 1). Conduct a One-Way ANOVA using 'ln_count' as the Dependent Variable and 'spray' as the Grouping Variable, including Tukey post-hoc tests. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/InsectSprays_Transformed.omv. Document the results in /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/anova_report.txt with three lines: the F-statistic (rounded to 3 decimal places), the p-value, and the count of sprays significantly different from 'Spray A' (p < 0.05) according to the Tukey post-hoc analysis.
